nodes.name: 鐮嘴管鴰
nodes.summary: 鐮嘴管鴰（ʻIʻiwi，学名 Drepanis coccinea），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，主要威胁包括气候变化。

nodes.name: 气候变化
nodes.summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: |date=2017-04-03 |title=Altitudinal migration and the future of an iconic H awaiian honeycreeper in response to climate change and management |journal=Ecological Monographs |volume=87 |issue=3 |pages=410–428 |doi=10.1002/ecm.1253 |bibcode=2017EcoM...87..410G |issn=0012-9615}} Iiwi was formerly classified as a near threatened species by the IUCN, but recent research has proven that it is rarer than previously believed
